instructions.purpose: This file tracks mathematical topics that were requested but not found in the math corpus.
instructions.usage: When SWEObeyMe encounters missing math topics, it appends them here and notifies the user.
instructions.addingTopics: To add a missing topic, append to the missingTopics array with topic name, category, and context.
instructions.resolvingTopics: When a topic is added to the corpus, remove it from this file.
